commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c090d80eea2a69e35a207b896ad39fef76d2678d)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Feishu reply dispatcher so streaming-enabled auto-mode plain replies start and close a Feishu streaming card, with dispatcher tests for final text, assistant-start, partial-snapshot, and non-streaming paths.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +58. Total +62 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, not from a live Feishu run: current main sends auto-mode plain final text through the normal message path even though the Feishu docs describe `streaming: true` as interactive-card output. The PR’s introduced tool-summary drop is also source-reproducible from the dispatch-kind union and active streaming branch.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The code repair is narrow, but this external PR also needs contributor-supplied real Feishu/CardKit proof before merge.

target.title: fix(feishu): stream plain replies as cards
target.body:
## Summary

- Treat Feishu `streaming: true` as the documented streaming-card delivery path for plain final text in `renderMode: "auto"`, instead of falling through to normal text messages.
- Start the Feishu streaming-card session when assistant output begins or partial snapshots arrive, so Codex/app-server replies can use one card lifecycle before the final close.
- Keep completed block replies gated by `blockStreaming`; this does not turn default internal block payloads into visible messages, and `streaming: false` keeps the existing plain-message path.

## Verification

- `npm exec --yes --package=pnpm@11.2.2 -- pnpm exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `npm exec --yes --package=pnpm@11.2.2 -- pnpm exec oxlint extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `npm exec --yes --package=pnpm@11.2.2 -- pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.ts extensions/feishu/src/reply-dispatcher.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `npm exec --yes --package=pnpm@11.2.2 -- pnpm exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/codex/src/app-server/event-projector.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/agent-runner-execution.test.ts --testNamePattern "assistant message start|onPartialReply|bridges CLI assistant agent events"`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Feishu/Lark replies with `channels.feishu.streaming=true` and default `renderMode:auto` should use interactive streaming cards for ordinary assistant text, not ordinary grey text bubbles.

Real environment tested: Local Feishu dispatcher harness and adjacent Codex/auto-reply hook tests on this patched branch.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the verification commands above after applying this patch on branch `codex/feishu-streaming-card-replies` at commit `c090d80eea`.

Evidence after fix: The Feishu dispatcher test now proves plain final text starts and closes a `FeishuStreamingSession`; assistant message start and partial snapshots also start the same streaming-card lifecycle; `streaming:false` still sends plain text; default block payload delivery remains suppressed unless `blockStreaming` is enabled.

Observed result after fix: The patched dispatcher routes plain assistant replies to streaming-card delivery when streaming is enabled, while preserving the normal message path for explicit non-streaming configuration.

What was not tested: I did not attach a live Feishu tenant screenshot or CardKit network artifact from this patched branch. The change is intentionally small and covered by the plugin dispatcher harness, but a maintainer/operator live proof would still be useful before merge.

Supersedes the earlier message-tool routing attempt in #88228; this PR targets the actual Feishu streaming-card reply path instead.
target.author: qiangu
